title: glossogyne tenuifolia
intro: Glossogyne tenuifolia, also known as the Himalayan Balsam Root, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Glossogyne tenuifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
